title: LR-112
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: The Spirit of the Lord has filled the whole world And that which contains all things understands what is said, Alleluia.

title: Lord, send out your Spirit
author: Ps 104:1, 24, 29-30, 31, 34
snippet: Lord, send out your Spirit, and renew the face of the earth.

title: Gospel Acclamation
author: Pentecost Sunday
snippet: Come Holy Spirit, fill the hearts of your faithful And kindle in them the fire of your love.

title: Holy Spirit
author: Ken Canedo
snippet: Holy Spirit, come into our lives. Holy Spirit, make us truly wise.

title: LR-114
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: They were all filled with the Holy Spirit And spoke of the marvels of God, Alleluia.

title: One Bread, One Body
author: John Foley SJ
snippet: One bread, one body, one Lord of all, one cup of blessing which we bless. And we, though many, throughout the earth, we are one body in this one Lord.

title: Holy Spirit, Come to Me
author: Julie Hoy.
snippet: Holy Spirit, come to me; Open my eyes to you. Holy Spirit, come to me; Open my eyes to you.

title: Kindle the Fire
author: Jim Ngo/Suno
snippet: Come, Holy Spirit, come (Kindle the fire of love)

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
